name: session_search
description: Gives you related context the user has shared based on the query.

query.description: Full-text search query (supports FTS5 syntax: phrases in quotes, boolean operators). Add related terminalogy so that the search works effectively

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10, max: 50)

mode.description: Search scope. 'session' (default)=current session histories only, 'user'=all sessions and histories for the superuser.
